posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are running a limited time sale offer on our app “Schedule Recurring Tasks”. We have slashed the price of our UNLIMITED usage plan from $1000 to just $10 (99% discount).

And I am telling you it won’t last long, so grab it ASAP - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Also a quick reminder about features of the app to make your decision easier

  1. Highly customizable recurring schedules on item level
  2. Set target group, status and due date on schedule run
  3. List view to see and edit all your tasks from one place
  4. Calendar view to see your upcoming tasks date wise
  5. Send notification to the task assignee

PS: If you start on this plan, you will be kept on this plan even after the pricing plans become expensive in future. So you need not worry about that
